name: 8th Street Park
description: These are public courts.  Douglas recently resurface their tennis courts and added Pickleball court lines utilizing the tennis net.

name: Butterfield RV Resort & Observatory
description: Come play pickleball at Butterfield RV Resort & Observatory in Benson, AZ! There is 1 outdoor court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — No fee but must sign waiver in the office.  Hours 8-5, 7 days a week

name: Higgins Park
description: Come play pickleball at Higgins Park in Bisbee, AZ! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Oscar Yrun Community Center
description: Oscar Yrun Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Sierra Vista, AZ. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: San Pedro RV Resort
description: San Pedro RV Resort is a place to play pickleball in Benson, AZ. There is 1 outdoor court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private.

name: Veterans Memorial Park Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Veterans Memorial Park Gym in Sierra Vista, AZ! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.
